header.description: Submit a request for management letters, older statements, visitor records, or archived circulars.

options.label: Account Statement
options.description: Maintenance, sinking fund, or water statement for a selected period.

options.label: Residence Confirmation Letter
options.description: Official management letter confirming your unit address and occupancy.

options.label: Access or Visitor Record
options.description: Guard house entry log or visitor registration confirmation.

options.label: Archived Circular or Notice
options.description: Older circulars, notices, and management memos not listed in the app.

purposeField.label: Purpose
purposeField.placeholder: Tell us what the document is needed for

options.label: Digital PDF
options.description: Delivered to your in-app account or registered email.

options.label: Printed Copy
options.description: Prepared for collection at the management office.

notesField.label: Notes
notesField.placeholder: Add dates, reference numbers, or any details that help us locate the document

uploadField.label: Supporting files
uploadField.title: Attach supporting proof
uploadField.description: Upload an ID copy, payment slip, booking form, or reference screenshot if management needs supporting context.

timelineCard.title: Typical turnaround within 1 to 3 working days
timelineCard.description: Certified letters and archived records may take longer if manual retrieval, JMB confirmation, or stamping is required.

cta.helperText: Management will review your request and contact you if additional details or payment are required.

messages.errorDescription: The mocked document request form could not be loaded.
messages.successDescription: Your document request has been logged. A confirmation will appear once the management office starts processing it.
